query: SELECT reviewSkipped, COUNT(*) as count FROM completed_jobs GROUP BY reviewSkipped; SELECT jobDate, COUNT(*) as count, reviewSkipped FROM completed_jobs WHERE jobDate >= '2026-03-18' GROUP BY jobDate, reviewSkipped ORDER BY jobDate DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT reviewSkipped, COUNT(*) as count FROM completed_jobs GROUP BY reviewSkipped; SELECT jobDate, COUNT(*) as count, reviewSkipped FROM completed_jobs WHERE jobDate >= '2026-03-18' GROUP BY jobDate, reviewSkipped ORDER BY jobDate DESC LIMIT 5;
